center.name: 安蒂波德斯群岛
center.summary: 安蒂波德斯群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Fairy prion、Eastern rockhopper penguin，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|At Macquarie Island The eastern rockhopper penguin is found in the southern Indian and Pacific oceans from Prince Edward Islands to the Antipodes Islands. Rockhopper penguins, in general, occupied a circumpolar distribution in the Arctic during the breeding season. Eastern rockhopper penguins breed in the Marion Islands, Macquarie island and subantarctic islands in New Zealand such as the Antipodes islands and Campbell island. These penguins occupy a mainly marine pelagic habitat and only return to land to breed and moult

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |location=New York, NY |page=51}} Their colonies can be found in the Falklands Isles, the Bass Strait Islands of Australia, the Crozet Isles, as well as the Chatham Islands, the Antipodes Islands, and the Snares Islands of New Zealand amongst many other places
